name: deepgrade
description: DeepGrade: AI-powered codebase grading, planning, auditing, and operational readiness. Gives your codebase a letter grade and a plan to level up. Stack-agnostic.

hooks.command: bash -c 'export PATH="$PATH:$LOCALAPPDATA/Microsoft/WinGet/Links:/usr/local/bin";command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1||echo "[DeepGrade] WARNING: jq not installed. Safety hooks (force-push guard, migration guard, db deploy guard) will use fallback parsing. Install jq for best reliability: winget install jqlang.jq">&2;D=docs/plans;[ ! -d "$D" ]&&[ -d plans ]&&D=plans;[ ! -d "$D" ]&&exit 0;P=$(ls -td "$D"/*/ 2>/dev/null|head -1);[ -z "$P" ]&&exit 0;echo "[DeepGrade] Active plan: $(basename $P)"'

bash -c 'export PATH="$PATH:$LOCALAPPDATA/Microsoft/WinGet/Links:/usr/local/bin";I=$(cat);F=$(echo "$I"|jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null);[ -z "$F" ]&&F=$(echo "$I"|grep -o '"'"'"file_path":"[^"]*"'"'"'|head -1|sed '"'"'s/"file_path":"//;s/"$//'"'"');[ -z "$F" ]&&exit 0;F=$(echo "$F"|tr "\\\\" "/");case "$F" in */migrations/*|*/Migrations/*) ;; *) exit 0;; esac;echo "$F"|grep -qiE "\.sql$"||exit 0;[ ! -f "$F" ]&&exit 0;echo "[DeepGrade] MIGRATION GUARD: Editing existing migration $F. Create a NEW migration instead.">&2;exit 2'

bash -c 'export PATH="$PATH:$LOCALAPPDATA/Microsoft/WinGet/Links:/usr/local/bin";I=$(cat);C=$(echo "$I"|jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty" 2>/dev/null);[ -z "$C" ]&&C=$(echo "$I"|grep -o '"'"'"command":"[^"]*"'"'"'|head -1|sed '"'"'s/"command":"//;s/"$//'"'"');[ -z "$C" ]&&exit 0;echo "$C"|grep -qE "git\s+push.*--force"&&echo "[DeepGrade] BLOCKED: Force push not allowed.">&2&&exit 2;echo "$C"|grep -qE "git\s+reset\s+--hard"&&echo "[DeepGrade] WARNING: git reset --hard discards changes.">&2&&exit 2;echo "$C"|grep -qE "(supabase\s+db\s+push|prisma\s+migrate\s+deploy|dotnet\s+ef\s+database\s+update|flyway\s+migrate|rails\s+db:migrate)"&&! echo "$C"|grep -qE "(--local|--dry-run|--dry|RAILS_ENV=test|RAILS_ENV=development)"&&echo "[DeepGrade] BLOCKED: Direct database deploy to remote. Use --dry-run to validate, or deploy via CI/CD.">&2&&exit 2;exit 0'

bash -c 'D=docs/plans;[ ! -d "$D" ]&&[ -d plans ]&&D=plans;P=$(ls -td "$D"/*/ 2>/dev/null|head -1);[ -z "$P" ]&&exit 0;echo "[DeepGrade] Compacting. Plan: $(basename $P). Resume with /deepgrade:plan $(basename $P)"'
